calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Carmelita C. Simbulan.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

John Gordon, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
George Garcia, Custodian of Records for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
Both Messrs. Gordon and Garcia appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Carmelita C. Simbulan.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Common Counts was filed January 21, 2020.
Defendant Carmelita C. Simbulan's Answer to the the Complaint was filed on April 1, 2020.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on August 28, 2020, setting trial for January 11, 2021.
Matter was assigned to Department 514 for Prove-Up Hearing on January 19, 2021.
Department 514 continued the matter to February 22, 2021.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed on December 2, 2020.
Code of Civil Procedure Section 98 Declaration of Deborah Taro in lieu of personal testimony at trial was served on defendant Carmelita C. Simbulan, and filed with the Clerk's Office on December 2, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on january 12, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Carmelita C. Simbulan, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $18,087.85.
Costs - $455.32.
Total - $18,543.17.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-19-2021 Continued To Feb-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-11-2021 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Set For Trial On Jan-11-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
